title: scabiosa simplex subsp. dentata
intro: Scabiosa simplex subsp. dentata is a rare and lesser-known variety of the pincushion flower, a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Scabiosa simplex subsp. dentata include its potential to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support skin health and promote overall well-being.
